name: Chronicles Of Ainysara: Yoreth / Fantasy RPG
description:
You're Not A Hero, Your Only Goal Is To Survive

You are one of the castaways on a harsh, unknown island located near the continent of Archolos. The ship you were traveling on was destroyed by a powerful storm. The island is teeming with tension—powerful trading forces are fighting for dominance, the guard is trying to maintain order, and those who want to change everything are operating in the shadows.

The continent you’re heading for is sinking into ever-deepening darkness. Something evil is approaching from the north, something that’s causing ships to stop setting sail. No one knows exactly what’s happening yet... but you can feel it in the air.

You have only what survived the wreck, your older brother by your side, and a single companion. No coins, no name in the records, no claim to anything.

You must survive, earn your place, and find a way forward—before what is coming reaches here as well.

On this island, magic doesn’t come easily. People must earn it over years—through arduous study under mysterious mentors or through rare artifacts. Demons, however, are magic by nature—which is why their presence feels like a cold shiver in the air.

The animals here are wild and dangerous. Ordinary wolves, boars, or birds can take you by surprise, and deep within the forests and swamps live creatures that hunt in packs, poison the air, or attack from the sky. Their hides, fangs, and glands become valuable materials for survival and crafting.

Not all races are equal, either. Humans rule the island and fear anything that is “too different.” Elves and dwarves are rarely seen, and most residents view them with suspicion or even hostility—their appearance and innate abilities are too reminiscent of the demons from ancient legends. Life outside the human world is much harder here.
creator: YungBartiiRPG
